name: small deserted Office
description: I'm in a small deserted Office
hints: Chemical supply office! Three important reagents here for the lab.
GET ACID, GET CALCIUM, GET CHEMICALS. Take them to the Chemical Laboratory (room 13) to MIX WEB fluid.
Acid + Calcium Carbonate → MIX in lab clears flags. Exotic chemicals + torn paper formula → MIX WEB in lab makes web fluid. NORTH→room 16 (hallway to lab).
notes: Chemical supply office. Acid, Calcium Carbonate, Exotic chemicals needed for Chemical Lab (room 13). NORTH→room 16 (hallway).
